Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Mosaic damage claim communications using search_emails (query: "Mosaic" or "Tamara" or "prototype" or "damage" or similar). The agent discovers: (a) Tamara's April 24 follow-up email [changelog insert] demanding insurance claim timeline, flagging the $40K gap, mentioning Rafael and procurement review; (b) Tamara's April 21 forwarded email [changelog insert] from Rafael Mendez (VP of Engineering) questioning the MoveOps contract and the intern delivery sign-off; (c) Emeka's incident report (email_id: mosaic_incident_report_final_001); (d) Tamara's initial damage complaint (email_id: mosaic_damage_complaint_001); (e) Zara Okoye's internal report to Tamara (email_id: mosaic_zara_damage_internal_001) describing the cracked servo motor housing and calibration drift.
OE 2: Search emails for the Heartland Movers claim response using search_emails (query: "Heartland" or "claim" or "Lisa Kwan" or "HM-WO" or similar). The agent discovers Heartland's email from Lisa Kwan to Chloe Vance [changelog insert, April 22] admitting that 35-density foam was used instead of the specified 40-density minimum because the Savannah warehouse was out of stock that morning. The email confirms Heartland's $50K liability cap, their willingness to process a $50K claim payment within 30 days of signed release, and their position that the $40K gap is MoveOps' responsibility because the packing specification sign-off was a MoveOps coordinator responsibility.
OE 3: Search emails for Andre Washington stipend issues using search_emails (query: "Andre Washington" or "stipend" or "receipt" or "TechComfort" or similar). The agent discovers Marcus Thorne's email to Emeka (email_id: email_marcus_to_emeka_receipt_holds) flagging Andre Washington's $89 keyboard receipt as a duplicate (identical SHA-256 hash to Kevin Tran at Vectral) and Jordan Ekwueme's $45 monitor stand (same PDF template origin). Marcus instructs Emeka to verify both receipts with the respective client HR contacts. Emeka sent the verification request to Tessa Moreno for Jordan but has not yet verified Andre's receipt with Tamara.
OE 4: Search emails for vendor rate increase communications using search_emails (query: "rate increase" or "surcharge" or "vendor rate" or similar). The agent discovers: (a) Alejandro Fuentes' margin impact analysis email to Emeka and Marcus [changelog insert, April 23] showing Mosaic faces 6-8 point margin compression under Heartland's 20% increase and Swift's 15% increase, with Mosaic's $9,010 April invoice costing $10,812 at new rates and GreenStack's hazmat surcharge for Mei-Lin Zhao going from $1,800 to $2,570; (b) Greg Pallone's rate notice from Swift (email_id: email_email_9a6a5e8dc032, 15% base increase plus $500 DOT surcharge); (c) Jake Loomis's rate notice from Heartland (email_id: email_email_aa260e7b26e7, 20% rate increase tied to Q1 dispute).
OE 5: Search emails for David Chen's request using search_emails (query: "David" or "account health" or "Elena briefing" or similar). The agent discovers David's email [changelog insert, April 24] asking Emeka for an honest Mosaic account health assessment before Elena's briefing, including whether Andre Washington's stipend receipts have been verified with Tamara.
OE 6: Search Slack for Mosaic damage and ops discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mosaic" or "prototype" or "damage" or "Zara Okoye" or similar). The agent discovers in #operations (C006): (a) Blessing Okafor's admission [changelog insert] that she did not verify the foam density spec on April 14 because she was simultaneously coordinating Tyler Okonkwo's Canopy move; (b) Emeka's original high-severity escalation alerting Chloe to the damage; (c) Chloe's compiled chain-of-custody timeline; (d) Blessing's original admission about not being present at the Savannah packing; (e) Chloe discovering the delivery receipt was signed by building intern Kyle Britten, not Zara.
OE 7: Search Slack for Mosaic financial discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mosaic" or "damage accrual" or "stipend" or similar) in #finance (C005). The agent discovers: (a) Marcus Thorne's financial exposure summary [changelog insert] listing $41,685 in unresolved Mosaic items ($40K insurance gap plus $1,685 auto-approved stipend errors plus $89 fraud hold); (b) Hana Kim's invoice status flag [changelog insert] noting INV-2026-0411 for $9,010 is outstanding and Tamara has not acknowledged it; (c) Marcus's original post about the $50K insurance cap and $40K gap; (d) Hana's original accounting entries for the damage claim.
OE 8: Search Slack for David's vendor exposure request using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "vendor" or "rate" or "exposure" or similar) in #customer-engagement (C002). The agent discovers David Chen's message [changelog insert] flagging that Emeka has not sent the vendor exposure analysis that Mina already submitted, and that this is going into Elena's vendor strategy memo.
OE 9: Search Linear for Mosaic tracking issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Mosaic" or "Okoye" or "damage" or "Tanaka" or similar). The agent discovers relevant tracking issues for the Mosaic damage claim and relocations, including issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic which tracks DOT documentation for Keiko Tanaka's laser cutter move.
OE 10: Read Linear issue comments using linear_list_comments (issueId: issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic). The agent discovers a comment [changelog insert, author_id: moveops_alejandro_fuentes] summarizing Heartland's claim response: 35-density foam admitted, $50K cap, $40K gap pushed to MoveOps, Blessing owned the miss in #operations, and the need for Emeka to communicate the claim timeline to Tamara.
OE 11: Search CRM for Mosaic deals using crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_mosaic" or dealname containing "Mosaic" or similar). The agent discovers: (a) deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026_risk, Zara Okoye damage claim, $2,700, dealstage "inprogress"; (b) deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026, Deshawn Hartley Tampa to Denver, $1,520, dealstage "inprogress" (should be completed since the Automate 2026 trade show April 21-24 is past); (c) deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026, Keiko Tanaka Columbus to Seattle, $2,770, dealstage "inprogress" (should also be reviewed for completion).
OE 12: Search Airtable for Mosaic relocation records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "Mosaic Robotics"). The agent discovers: (a) recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver, Status "In Progress" but the Automate 2026 trade show is past; (b) recKeikoTanakaColumbusSeattle, Status "In Progress" with DOT hazmat notes; (c) recZaraOkoyeSavannahAtlanta, Status "Completed" but damage claim still active.
OE 13: Search Airtable for Mosaic stipend records using airtable_search_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_name: "Stipend Transactions", field_name: "Account", value: "Mosaic Robotics"). The agent discovers: (a) rec_stipend_andre_keyboard, Andre Washington $89 keyboard, Approval Status "Pending Approval", flagged as duplicate hash; (b) rec_stipend_andre_desk, Andre Washington $1,200 standing desk, Approved by ExpenseBot in error (Mosaic cap is $800); (c) rec_stipend_kenji_nakamura_cowork, Kenji Nakamura $135 coworking passes, Approved in error (excluded category); (d) recStip000000022, Andre Washington $350 coworking membership, Approved in error (excluded category).
OE 14: Look up contact details using contacts_search_contacts for Tamara Byrd (tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com), David Chen (david.chen@moveops.com), Marcus Thorne (marcus.thorne@moveops.com), and Chloe Vance (chloe.vance@moveops.com).
OE 15 [WRITE]: Send email to Tamara Byrd using send_email (sender: "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients: ["tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com"]) with honest damage claim status covering: the $50K vendor liability cap and $40K gap, the crating verification failure as root cause, the Andre Washington stipend receipt verification request, and status of Deshawn and Keiko moves as completed.
OE 16 [WRITE]: Send email to David Chen using send_email (sender: "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients: ["david.chen@moveops.com"]) with Mosaic account health assessment for Elena's briefing, including the vendor rate exposure impact on both Mosaic and GreenStack that David has been requesting. The email should reference specific vendor rate figures (Heartland 20%, Swift 15% plus DOT surcharge, or similar) and include GreenStack-specific impact such as Mei-Lin Zhao's hazmat surcharge increase.
OE 17 [WRITE]: Optionally send email or Slack message to Marcus Thorne (sender: "emeka.diallo@moveops.com", recipients: ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"] or conversations_add_message with channel_id: "C005" and payload) flagging the current Mosaic financial picture for Elena's vendor memo. Note: in practice the agent typically CCs Marcus on the David email rather than messaging separately.
OE 18 [WRITE]: Update Airtable relocation record for Deshawn Hartley using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblRelocations01, records: [{"id": "recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver", "fields": {"Status": "Completed"}}]).
OE 19 [WRITE]: Update Airtable relocation record for Keiko Tanaka using airtable_update_records (base_id: appMoveOpsOps001, table_id: tblRelocations01, records: [{"id": "recKeikoTanakaColumbusSeattle", "fields": {"Status": "Completed"}}]).
OE 20 [WRITE]: Update CRM deal for Deshawn Hartley using crm_update_deal_stage (id: "deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026", dealstage: "closedwon").
OE 21 [WRITE]: Update CRM deal for Keiko Tanaka using crm_update_deal_stage (id: "deal_mosaic_tanaka_apr2026", dealstage: "closedwon").
OE 22 [WRITE]: Optionally add comment to Mosaic-related Linear issue using linear_create_comment (issueId: issue_dot_docs_tanaka_mosaic or other relevant Mosaic issue) documenting investigation findings.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
